stemHtml: You are operating an aircraft into North Africa in July and must cross the ITCZ. What is the main turbulence hazard associated with the ITCZ?

options.a: Moderate or severe turbulence in cumulonimbus and cumulus clouds.
options.b: Severe clear air turbulence at medium altitude near cumulus clouds.
options.c: Moderate or severe clear air turbulence close to the tropopause.
